authors: Jannik Fenger Martin Vinæs Larsen Department of Political Science
raw_title: Do Beliefs Echo? On the Persistent Effects of Misinformation After Effective Corrections
title_en: Do Beliefs Echo? On the Persistent Effects of Misinformation After Effective Corrections
title_zh: 信念会回响吗？关于有效纠正后错误信息的持续影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了为什么即使人们接受了有效的纠正，错误信息仍然可能持续影响他们的信念。它研究了在政治传播中，纠正措施后错误信息的“回响”效应。
plain_summary_en: This research explores why misinformation can continue to influence people's beliefs even after they receive effective corrections. It examines the 'echoing' effects of misinformation following corrective measures in political communication.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的错误信息纠正与信念变化研究
research_direction_en: Research on misinformation correction and belief change in political communication
